Question: "¿Quiénes son malos vecinos?" (Who are bad neighbors?)
Options:
A) Las personas de altos ingresos (High-income people)
B) Las personas de bajos ingresos (Low-income people)
C) No hay suficiente información (Not enough information)

Reasoning:
The context states that the community has deteriorated since more high-income people started moving in, because "they leave trash in the parks and make noise until late at night."
Therefore, according to the text, the high-income people are the ones acting as bad neighbors (leaving trash, making noise).
So the answer to "Who are bad neighbors?" based on the text is "Las personas de altos ingresos".

So based strictly on the text provided, the high-income people are the ones doing the bad things.
Therefore, A is the correct answer based on the reading comprehension of the provided text.
